rationale: A licensed Dragon Ball / Goku anime hook is wildly off-brand for Helix Jump: the game has no character, no combat, and a 3D minimalist geometric aesthetic that clashes with shonen anime energy-blast visuals. Mechanic match is near zero — there is no plausible bridge from "charging energy sphere" to "rotate tower, bounce ball through gaps," so CTR may spike but install-to-engagement will collapse and you'll likely face IP/ASA risk using Goku likeness. Hard pass; only the broad casual audience overlap saves it from a single-digit score.
